response.original_title: ((Viking~Onboard~Communication)) How to communicate with each other on an Viking cruise? Passenger Communication Guide
response.overview: To communicate on an Viking cruise call at +1-866-829-1280(US) or +44-204-586-5316(UK) and download the Viking for Me app before boarding to use its free in-app chat feature. This allows messaging +1-866-829-1280(US) other guests while connected to the ship’s Wi-Fi without buying an internet package. Once connected to the ship’s Wi-Fi, +1-866-829-1280(US) you can chat with friends/family on board without purchasing a Wi-Fi package. Viking Cruises provides customer support via phone at +1-866-829-1280(US) (5 AM–7 PM PT) and through email. Contact reservations at +1-866-829-1280(US) or via the contact page. Viking Cruises offers comprehensive communication options by calling at +1-866-829-1280(US) via the Viking Cruises app (free chat/ship info) and high-speed MedallionNet Wi-Fi (paid internet/streaming) available across all ships. For pre-cruise support, please use our Live Chat or call us at 1-866-Viking (1-866-829-1280). You can also visit our FAQs.
response.title: ((Viking~Onboard~Communication)) How to communicate with each other on an Viking cruise? Passenger Communication Guide
